text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen is a special G1 race. The only
Umamusume who are allowed to run it are those
voted in by fans.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
T-Trainer, I've got the jitters! My legs are starting
to shake too. I might be scared...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: But I'm still gonna do this!
choice_data_list:
Good. You've got the people's vote behind
you, so hold your head high!

Good. You've got the people's vote behind
you, so hold your head high!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
People hardly noticed Kitasan Black at first, but
as time passed, her popularity crept up steadily.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: This year's fan rankings are in! In third...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: It's Kitasan Black!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hello, everyone! Thank you so much for your
support! I won't let you down!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clap, clap, clap!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now, she's climbed all the way up to third place.
She's proved to everyone the value of steady,
persistent effort.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And claiming the honor of this year's most
popular Umamusume is—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Fsshhh... fsshhh...

text_block_list.name: Local Fisherman
text_block_list.text:
Mngh?! The heck is that comin' in from the
ocean? No way...

text_block_list.name: Local Fisherman
text_block_list.text: I-it's a boat! A big gold'n boat!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Peace, peace! There's nothing like raking in snow
crabs aboard a gold shipping boat! Coming to
you live, it's the one and only Gold Shiiip!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The whole area erupts in applause as Gold Ship
makes a surprise entrance from out of nowhere.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Yo, Kitasan. Looks like you've finally made port
at this fishery.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! The beach is where everything clicked for
me!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
That's the spirit! Bring it on! You were nothing but
small fry this summer...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Now lemme see if you've managed to become a
real whopper yet! First up, strike a pose!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You've gotta do it like this! Just so! C'mon, show
me what you've got!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Like this? I can't afford to mess up during the big
moment, so I've got to nail this while I can!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Please show me how it's done, Golshi!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fun concerts and fierce races—that's a year-end
festival in a nutshell. Now, Kitasan Black takes on
Gold Ship the Unsinkable Battleship!
